description: Drive a StablecoinX business account — auth, API keys, sessions, paymaster, and webhooks.
name: io.github.e2xlabs/stablecoinx-mcp

environmentVariables.description: EVM chain ID for the smart account. The StablecoinX harness supports three testnets: 84532 (Base Sepolia, default), 421614 (Arbitrum Sepolia), 11155111 (Ethereum Sepolia).
environmentVariables.name: SCX_CHAIN_ID

environmentVariables.description: Public thirdweb client ID (publishable, not a secret). Must match the harness dashboard client ID.
environmentVariables.name: THIRDWEB_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Origin header sent on outbound thirdweb calls; must be a domain allowed for THIRDWEB_CLIENT_ID.
environmentVariables.name: THIRDWEB_ORIGIN

environmentVariables.description: Passphrase used to encrypt the local state file (JWT / API key / session key) at rest. Pick any string.
environmentVariables.name: SCX_STATE_PASSPHRASE

packageArguments.description: Run setup to install the bundled skill and register this MCP via `claude mcp add` (optional; for MCP clients that provide an `mcp add` CLI).

title: StablecoinX
